nodes.label: AI as administrative assistant for refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I treat the AI as an administrative assistant, not a knowledge worker

nodes.label: AI for formatting and data presentation
nodes.grounding_span: I am not very good at presentation formatting and data presentation, so the AI was helpful

nodes.label: AI reliability and factual accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I do not trust AI to not hallucinate and/or fabricate data

nodes.label: Human control over creative and factual core
nodes.label_negative: AI autonomy over creative and factual tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle creative tasks myself

nodes.label: AI for entry-level tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Any tasks that would require only an entry-level employee are likely candidates for AI to assume

nodes.label: Professional competence and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: The documents I create have to be factually valid with supporting data

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: it took only two iterations for me to get output that I was satisfied with

nodes.label: Human judgment and nuanced understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I don't believe AI will be able to understand the nuances of a constituency and shape policy

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for overcoming skill gap
nodes.grounding_span: I am not very good at presentation formatting and data presentation, so the AI was helpful

nodes.label: Distrust of AI for factual tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I do not trust AI to not hallucinate and/or fabricate data

nodes.label: Cautious approach due to observing colleagues' misuse
nodes.grounding_span: I have seen my colleagues misuse AI and suffer consequences, so I learned early that I need to validate output

nodes.label: Openness to AI replacing entry-level staff functions
nodes.grounding_span: I can see a future where AI could replace some of my staff's functions

nodes.label: Iterative refinement based on output satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: If the first output meets my needs, I am finished. If I feel that I need more refinement, I will ask the AI to make those refinements

nodes.label: Observational learning from others' experiences
nodes.grounding_span: I have seen my colleagues misuse AI and suffer consequences, so I learned early that I need to validate output
